title: lathyrus inermis subsp. angustifolius
intro: Lathyrus inermis subsp. angustifolius, also known as the narrow-leaved vetchling, is a perennial legume plant native to Europe and Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lathyrus inermis subsp. angustifolius include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and act as an antimicrobial agent. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
